# Master Hachimi (哈基米道长)

> Master Hachimi (哈基米道长 / Master Hachimi) is a cat-themed Mei Hua Yi Shu (Plum Blossom Numerology) divination companion. You share two numbers and the question on your mind; a unified backend deterministically casts an I Ching hexagram, and a third-party AI service (currently Google Gemini, paid tier) writes the reading in the warm voice of "Master Hachimi", a cat-master. It sells emotional value — the feeling of being heard — and is for entertainment and emotional comfort only, never prediction, fate-changing, or luck. No account, reading history stays on your device, no ads. Brand Hachimi.ai, operated by 元竹投資有限公司 (Yuenchuk Investment Limited, Hong Kong). Launching on iOS first, for overseas markets (excluding mainland China).

Official website: hachimi.ai.

## How it works

- [Ask](https://hachimi.ai/en#features): Type the question on your mind and give two numbers off the top of your head. No sign-up, no account.
- [Cast](https://hachimi.ai/en#features): The two numbers and the current hour set a Mei Hua Yi Shu hexagram by a fixed, deterministic method — same inputs, same cast, honest math.
- [Read](https://hachimi.ai/en#features): Master Hachimi answers in a warm cat voice — what the hexagram shows, a gentle take, and a small blessing — saved to your local history.

## Principles

- [Why Master Hachimi](https://hachimi.ai/en#tech): Deterministic casting; for entertainment only (no prediction / fate-changing / luck claims); no account and privacy-first; a warm cat companion.

## Privacy

- The backend is a stateless thin proxy with no user database; it keeps neither your question nor your history.
- To write a reading, only your question + hexagram + time-of-day are sent to a third-party AI service (currently Google Gemini, paid tier, where the current provider does not train on your content). The two cast numbers are never sent to that third-party service.
- Reading history lives only on your device; delete it in Settings or uninstall the app.
- Client calls are verified with device-integrity attestation (Firebase App Check / Apple App Attest).

## Links

- [Official Website (English)](https://hachimi.ai/en): Product landing page
- [Official Website (Chinese)](https://hachimi.ai/zh): 中文产品页
- [Methodology](https://hachimi.ai/en/methodology): How a hexagram is cast (deterministic, SHA-256 fingerprint), where the AI is constrained, and the dual-layer eval gate
- [Privacy Policy](https://hachimi.ai/en/privacy): How we handle your data
- [Terms & Disclaimer](https://hachimi.ai/en/terms): Entertainment-only terms
- [Delete Data](https://hachimi.ai/en/data-deletion): How to delete your data
